overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player navigates sidewalks, crosses wet streets with moderate traffic, and walks through covered pedestrian areas with holographic advertisements and diverse pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with directional signs to Pacifica and Heywood districts

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk following two pedestrians ahead, passing other pedestrians on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and yellow pants walking ahead of the player
pedestrian in dark jacket and bright pink pants walking alongside companion

entered.detail: overhead street signs with white text pointing to Pacifica and Heywood districts
multi-lane road with wet reflective asphalt surface showing neon reflections
tall commercial buildings with orange neon accent lighting and large digital displays
gray and orange temporary construction wall blocking off building facade
blue metal street lamp posts with illuminated globes lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, following two pedestrians ahead. To the left, a busy multi-lane road reflects the neon lights from towering commercial buildings, while a construction barrier runs along the right side. Overhead signs indicate directions to the Pacifica and Heywood districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk with heavy neon signage and wet pavement

events.description: turns left to cross the multi-lane street at the intersection
silver sedan and dark SUV drive past on the wet road while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, looking left at oncoming traffic and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection on wet asphalt
dark SUV passing through the crosswalk area

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying animated advertisement with pink character
large elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead
vertical traffic light pole showing red signal lights

segments.scene_description: The player turns left to cross the wide intersection, navigating the wet crosswalk while vehicles pass by. A massive digital billboard dominates the left side of the view, while an elevated highway structure looms ahead. The street lamps recede into the distance as the player moves toward the center of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza under elevated highway with holographic advertisements

events.description: enters open plaza area beneath the massive elevated overpass structure
purple sports car drives through the plaza area from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza under the overpass, looking around at holographic ads and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving through the plaza intersection

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure displaying multiple rotating holographic advertisements
tall modern skyscraper with vertical lighting strips and reflective glass facade
tall building-mounted advertisement showing fashion model in white outfit

segments.scene_description: The player enters a spacious open plaza beneath the elevated highway, surrounded by towering glass buildings and holographic advertising pillars. A purple sports car drives past as the player navigates the wet pavement, with the massive concrete overpass structure dominating the overhead space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway entrance with storefronts and parked vehicles

events.description: enters covered pedestrian walkway with reduced sky visibility and overhead concrete structure
turns right to follow the covered walkway path alongside shops

agents.ego_description: entering the covered walkway area, passing by parked vehicles and approaching storefronts with neon displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and shorts walking toward the camera
pedestrian in dark jacket walking toward the camera from the covered area

entered.detail: concrete ceiling structure with exposed beams and linear fluorescent lighting
storefront glass windows with neon signs and illuminated merchandise displays
blue sports car parked along the edge of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered pedestrian walkway, transitioning from the open plaza to a more sheltered environment with overhead concrete structures. A blue sports car is parked along the right side near shop windows, while pedestrians approach from the opposite direction. The large vertical fashion billboard remains visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered arcade with closed shop shutters and neon open signs

events.description: passes by shop with red neon open sign and closed corrugated metal security shutter

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered passage, passing NPCs standing and conversing near closed storefronts

notable_agents.action: two NPCs standing and conversing near a closed shop shutter, one sitting on the ground
pedestrian in hat and brown pants walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: red and white illuminated neon sign reading OPEN in shop window
closed corrugated metal security shutters covering storefront entrances
external air conditioning units mounted on the building wall above shutters

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the narrow covered arcade, where the ceiling lowers and artificial lighting dominates. A neon OPEN sign glows in a shop window next to closed metal security shutters, while two NPCs converse nearby. The environment feels more enclosed and intimate compared to the open streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with mixed pedestrian traffic and storefronts

events.description: exits covered walkway back to open street with visible traffic and neon storefronts
green vintage-style car drives past on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to busy street, passing various pedestrians and observing storefronts

notable_agents.action: green vintage-style car with headlights on driving along the street
pedestrian in green jacket and white pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: ground-level storefronts with illuminated signs including red neon signage
stream of cars driving on the multi-lane road adjacent to sidewalk
concrete bench seating area on the sidewalk near street lamps

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway back to the open street, where neon-lit storefronts line the left side and moderate traffic flows on the right. A green vintage car drives past as the player passes pedestrians on the sidewalk, returning to the bustling urban atmosphere of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit metropolis, moving from wide, rain-slicked boulevards into a sheltered urban arcade before returning to the open street. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside a busy multi-lane road, following pedestrians past construction barriers and district signs before turning left to cross a wide intersection beneath a massive digital billboard. As the camera moves forward, the scene expands into a spacious open plaza dominated by a concrete highway overpass and holographic pillars, where a purple sports car glides across the pavement. The environment then shifts into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway and eventually a narrow, intimate arcade with low ceilings and glowing neon signs, passing closed security shutters and chatting NPCs. Finally, the camera exits the sheltered corridor and emerges back into the bustling urban atmosphere, passing a green vintage car and neon-lit storefronts along the open city street.
